description_long: This object is a classic double-action revolver with a blued steel frame and a wooden grip. The revolver features a six-chambered cylinder, visible in the open position, and is accompanied by several metallic cartridges. The grip is ergonomically shaped with a checkered pattern and a diamond-shaped embellishment, providing both style and secure handling. The barrel is medium-length, round, and finished in a dark, matte tone, with subtle markings visible on the side. The trigger guard is rounded and robust, offering ample space for finger placement. The overall construction suggests durability and reliability, typical of traditional revolvers used in urban environments.
description: A classic blued steel revolver with a wooden checkered grip and a six-chambered cylinder, accompanied by metallic cartridges. The design is robust and ergonomic, with a medium-length barrel and subtle markings.
description_view_0: Front and angled view showing the open cylinder with visible chambers and cartridges, as well as the muzzle and part of the grip.
description_view_1: Side profile displaying the full length of the revolver, the wooden grip with checkered pattern, and the closed cylinder.
description_view_2: Rear and top-down view highlighting the open cylinder, empty chambers, and the back of the grip, with cartridges nearby.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile focusing on the barrel, frame, and grip, with clear visibility of the revolver's markings.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is crafted from wood with a rich brown finish and features a pronounced ergonomic contour for comfortable handling. Its surface is adorned with a checkered pattern for enhanced grip, and a diamond-shaped embellishment is set into the center. The grip tapers slightly toward the bottom and is smoothly integrated into the frame, with no visible finger grooves but a classic, traditional revolver style.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is rounded and moderately thick, providing ample space for finger placement. It has a smooth, continuous curve with no undercuts or squared-off edges, and lacks any visible texturing or reinforcement. The design is utilitarian and robust, typical of classic revolvers.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is of medium length with a round profile and a matte blued finish. It is unthreaded and lacks any external compensators or porting. Subtle markings are present on the side, and the barrel appears solid and well-machined.
attribute_slide_markings: Visible markings include subtle engravings on the side of the barrel, likely indicating the manufacturer or model, though the exact text is not fully legible. The markings are understated and blend with the matte finish, positioned near the top of the barrel.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: As a revolver, this object does not feature a traditional magazine base or floorplate. The base of the grip is flat and smoothly finished, with no extensions, flares, or finger rests, maintaining a classic and simple revolver profile.
